KXCFLGAME-26JUL09OTTEDM-EDM.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXCFLGAME-26JUL09OTTEDM-EDM.rules_primary: If the Edmonton Elks win the Ottawa Redblacks vs Edmonton Elks professional CFL football game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXCFLGAME-26JUL09OTTEDM-EDM.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Ottawa Redblacks vs Edmonton Elks professional CFL football game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If the game is declared a tie, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both teams.
